# arena Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    arenaml = {
      source  = "arenaml.dev/tf/arenaml"
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_url` (String) Server URL
